title: Deliciously Roasted German Potato Casserole
description: A roasted, flaky, kid-friendly German dish featuring peanut oil and a mother-sauce base, perfect for vegetarians. This casserole is a delicious and satisfying meal for the whole family.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced potatoes with peanut oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread half of the potatoes in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic until they are softened.
Sprinkle the cooked onion and garlic over the potatoes in the baking dish.
In a small saucepan, whisk together the flour and vegetable broth until smooth, then bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and stir in the milk and shredded cheese until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
Pour the cheese sauce over the potatoes and onion in the baking dish.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
